parameters.content:
## Setup Guide

### 1. Supabase Credential
Create an n8n credential of type **Supabase**:
- **Host**: Your Supabase project URL (e.g. `https://abc123.supabase.co`)
- **Service Role Key**: Found in Supabase > Settings > API > `service_role` key

Apply this credential to all three Supabase nodes.

### 2. Platform Credentials
Open the **Publish to Platforms** Code node and replace the placeholder values at the top:
- `META_ACCESS_TOKEN` — Long-lived Facebook Page Access Token
- `FB_PAGE_ID` — Your Facebook Page ID
- `IG_USER_ID` — Your Instagram Business Account ID
- `LI_ACCESS_TOKEN` — LinkedIn OAuth2 token
- `LI_ORG_URN` — Your LinkedIn Organization URN

### 3. Google Drive Sharing
All files in your Drive `raw-files` folder must have sharing set to **"Anyone with the link can view"**. Without this, Meta and LinkedIn APIs cannot fetch the files.

### 4. Activate
Toggle the workflow **Active** once credentials are configured.

### How It Works
1. Runs every 5 minutes
2. Queries Supabase for posts in `approved_scheduled` stage
3. Filters to only posts whose date+time has passed (CST)
4. For each due post: marks as `posted`, publishes to each platform, logs to audit trail
5. Individual platform failures don't block other platforms
6. All results are logged to `post_audit_logs` for traceability

## Platform Support

| Platform | Status | Method |
|----------|--------|--------|
| Facebook | Ready | Graph API v21 — image + video |
| Instagram | Ready | Container → Poll → Publish (image, reel, carousel) |
| LinkedIn | Ready | Register Upload → Binary Upload → UGC Post |
| X / Twitter | Manual | Requires OAuth 1.0a signing — post manually |
| YouTube | Manual | Requires video upload API — post manually |
| TikTok | Manual | Limited API access — post manually |

### Meta Token Refresh
Facebook Page tokens expire after ~60 days. To refresh:
1. Go to developers.facebook.com > Your App > Tools > Graph API Explorer
2. Select your Page, generate a new token
3. Exchange for long-lived token via the API
4. Update `META_ACCESS_TOKEN` in the Code node

### Instagram Carousel
The workflow handles multi-image carousels automatically. Each file in `rawFiles` becomes a carousel slide. The master file is slide 1.

## Error Handling

- Each platform is wrapped in try/catch — one platform failing does not block others
- The Code node has **Continue On Fail** enabled so a crash in publishing still logs the audit
- If ALL platforms fail, the post is still marked `posted` to prevent infinite retry loops
- Failed platforms are listed in the audit log details
- Check the n8n execution log for full error traces

### Duplicate Prevention
- The post is marked `posted` BEFORE publishing starts
- If n8n crashes mid-publish, the post won't be retried on the next 5-min cycle
- To retry a failed post: change its stage back to `approved_scheduled` in the portal
